name: sennen
description: MIT-licensed ML research plugin for scientific datasets, Git, DVC, and reproducible evaluation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Scientific ML workflows for data, visualization, explanation, splits, metrics, baselines, review, and experiments.
interface.longDescription: Sennen packages reusable Codex skills for scientific ML work: connecting datasets, visualizing structure, explaining models, checking splits, choosing metrics, establishing baselines, running experiments, identifying defects, preprocessing features, and reviewing the approach with Git and DVC-aware workflows.
defaultPrompt: /sen:data connect scientific data sources with Git and DVC support.
/sen:baseline establish a reproducible baseline to beat.
